---
name: 💡 Feature Request (English)
about: Suggest a new window-management workflow, modifier gesture, or grid option
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!-- 
IMPORTANT: Contributions to this repository should follow our Contributing Guidelines.
Please read: https://github.com/bnku/cinnamon-dynamic-tiler/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md
-->

**1. Is your feature request related to a problem?**
*A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when..."*

**2. Describe the proposed solution**
*Describe the new feature or behavior. If applicable, specify modifiers held, keyboard shortcut ideas, or window sliding mechanics.*

**3. Describe alternatives you've considered**
*A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.*

**4. Additional Context / Use Case**
*Why is this beneficial to your daily workspace workflow? Add any mockups, diagrams, or screenshots to help explain.*
